ddls:
CREATE TABLE "squirrel_sightings" (
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each squirrel sighting */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sighting location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sighting location */,
  "squirrel_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the squirrel */,
  "hectare" TEXT /* Hectare where the squirrel was sighted */,
  "shift" TEXT /* Shift during which the squirrel was sighted (e.g., AM, PM) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sighting */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the sighting */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the sighting */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the sighting */,
  "squirrel_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the squirrel */,
  "squirrel_weight" REAL /* Weight of the squirrel */,
  "squirrel_height" REAL /* Height of the squirrel */,
  "squirrel_behavior_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the squirrel's behavior */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the sighting */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the sighting data */,
  "hectare_squirrel_number" INTEGER /* Squirrel number in the hectare */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the squirrel (e.g., Adult, Juvenile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_sightings_squirrel_id FOREIGN KEY ("squirrel_id") REFERENCES squirrels ("squirrel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_sightings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_squirrel_sightings_hectare FOREIGN KEY ("hectare") REFERENCES hectares ("hectare_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "squirrels" (
  "squirrel_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each squirrel */,
  "primary_fur_color" TEXT /* Primary fur color of the squirrel */,
  "highlight_fur_color" TEXT /* Highlight fur color of the squirrel */,
  "combination_of_fur_colors" TEXT /* Combination of primary and highlight fur colors */,
  "color_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the squirrel's fur color */,
  "squirrel_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the squirrel */,
  "squirrel_weight" REAL /* Weight of the squirrel */,
  "squirrel_height" REAL /* Height of the squirrel */,
  "squirrel_tail_length" REAL /* Length of the squirrel's tail */,
  "squirrel_breed" TEXT /* Breed of the squirrel */,
  "squirrel_health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the squirrel (e.g., Healthy, Injured) */,
  "squirrel_behavior_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the squirrel's behavior */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("squirrel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squirrel sighting */,
  "running" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was running */,
  "chasing" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was chasing */,
  "climbing" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was climbing */,
  "eating" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was eating */,
  "foraging" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was foraging */,
  "other_activities" TEXT /* Other activities the squirrel was engaging in */,
  "activity_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in seconds */,
  "activity_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the activity (e.g., Occasionally, Frequently) */,
  "activity_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES squirrel_sightings ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction record */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squirrel sighting */,
  "approaches" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel approached humans */,
  "indifferent" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel was indifferent to humans */,
  "runs_from" INTEGER /* Whether the squirrel ran from humans */,
  "other_interactions" TEXT /* Other interactions the squirrel had with humans */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "interaction_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the interaction (e.g., Occasionally, Frequently) */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES squirrel_sightings ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, park ranger, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sighting_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location record */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the squirrel sighting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sighting (e.g., Above Ground, Ground Plane) */,
  "above_ground_sighter_measurement" TEXT /* Above ground sighter measurement */,
  "specific_location" TEXT /* Specific location of the sighting */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the sighting location */,
  "vegetation" TEXT /* Type of vegetation at the sighting location (e.g., Trees, Grass) */,
  "location_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sighting_locations_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES squirrel_sightings ("sighting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hectares" (
  "hectare_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each hectare */,
  "hectare_name" TEXT /* Name of the hectare */,
  "park_id" TEXT /* ID of the park where the hectare is located */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the hectare in square meters */,
  "vegetation_type" TEXT /* Type of vegetation in the hectare */,
  "water_sources" INTEGER /* Number of water sources in the hectare */,
  "food_sources" INTEGER /* Number of food sources in the hectare */,
  "squirrel_density" REAL /* Average number of squirrels per hectare */,
  "hectare_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the hectare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hectare_id")
)
